headline: Oil prices rise 3% as Iran rejects direct U.S. talks despite proposal review
summary: Oil prices rose after Iran signaled it had no intention of holding direct talks with the United States.

raw.headline: Oil prices rise 3% as Iran rejects direct U.S. talks despite proposal review

headline: Amazon To Rally Around 49%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Top analysts change outlook for top names. Citigroup, Tigress Fin, Piper Sandler, Morgan Stanley, HC Wainwright, Susquehanna, Raymond James and Goldman Sachs adjust price targets for companies like Braze, Amazon, TELA Bio, Smithfield Foods, Corcept Therapeutics, TechnipFMC, Phillips 66, and KB Home. See all changes at benzinga.com/analyst-stock-ratings.

headline: Raymond James Sets $205 Target on PSX as Refining Margins Nearly Double
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) has been one of the energy sector’s standout performers, with shares up 5.60% over the past week, 21.21% over the past month and 41.02% year-to-date. The stock recently touched a 52-week high of $185.37, with shares currently trading around $184.12. The Street consensus target sits at $162.33, but Raymond James is making ... headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on Phillips 66, Raises Price Target to $205
summary: Raymond James  analyst Justin Jenkins   maintains Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $175 to $205.

headline: Trump administration waives summer gasoline regulations to address surging fuel prices
summary: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin said the waivers will help prevent a fuel supply disruption in the U.S. during the Iran war.

headline: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan, Inc. Announce Extension of Second Open Season for Remaining Western Gateway Capacity
summary: HOUSTON, March 25, 2026--Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan, Inc. announced an extension of the second open season for the Western Gateway Pipeline.
